{{Fig|SuperMemo for Windows on the '''Professional''' [[Glossary:Level|level]] ('''[[File menu|File]] : [[Levels|Level]] : Professional'''). [[Statistics|Collection statistics]] are displayed on the left. [[Glossary:Element|Element]]'s [[Glossary:Ancestor|ancestors]] at the mid bottom show the place of the article in the Biochemistry [[Glossary:Branch|branch]]. [[Element data|Element's statistics]] at shown at the bottom-right. [[Element window]] in the center of the screen displays a [[Glossary:Topic|topic]] on glycolysis in cancer (a result of a split executed on the [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Glycolysis Glycolysis] article imported from [https://en.wikipedia.org Wikipedia]). Note '''[[Statistics#R-Metric|R-Metric]]''' of 17.351% which shows a huge advantage of [https://supermemo.guru/wiki/Algorithm_SM-18 Algorithm SM-18] over [https://supermemo.guru/wiki/Algorithm_SM-15 Algorithm SM-15] (on that particular day of learning)}}
